roles.name: Day-Keeper of the Tzolk'in
roles.description: Reader of the sacred 260-day count — designs the over-arching Salesforce solution and aligns it with the cosmic calendar.

roles.name: Halach Uinic (True Man)
roles.description: Supreme commander of the city — marshals delivery, holds the timeline, answers to the council.

roles.name: Keeper of the Codex
roles.description: Steward of the bark-paper records — guards layouts, fields, and permission sets.

roles.name: Stelae Carver
roles.description: Chisels Apex, LWC, and platform features into stone that lasts a baktun.

roles.name: Ahau of the Western Cities
roles.description: Lord-king over all Salesforce craft in the western lowlands — sets standards and guides senior carvers.

roles.name: Itz'at of Tikal
roles.description: Wise sage of the great city — practiced in customer requirements and ceremonial design.

roles.name: Acolyte of Palenque
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration through the temples under the Itz'at's eye.

roles.name: Sacbé Master Builder
roles.description: Architect of the white roads — the great causeways between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Sacbé Stone-layer
roles.description: Lays the limestone of API, middleware, and event flows along the Master Builder's road.

roles.name: Apprentice Causeway-builder
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the Mayan patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Temple
roles.description: Tends the wounded build — finds maladies in the offering before it reaches the altar.

roles.name: Voice of the Conch
roles.description: Sounds the great shell trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Drummer of the Plaza
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — beats the rhythm that gathers the people to the temple steps.

roles.name: Banner-Painter of Bonampak
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward — content, creative, and the daily mural.

roles.name: Scribe of the Popol Vuh
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the divine craft of design.

roles.name: Master Stelae Carver of Copán
roles.description: Eldest of the western carvers — the most intricate Apex glyphs are her work.

roles.name: Novice of the Cenote
roles.description: Apprentice drawn from the sacred well — learns the ways of declarative craft.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Creator Gods — Cosmic Order CRM Rollout
Xibalba — Place of Fright Surveillance Build
Mayan Rulers — Royal Court Analytics Implementation

creator-gods.name: First Word in the Void
creator-gods.description: Discovery sign-off — the creators speak the world into being.

creator-gods.name: Raising of the Sky
creator-gods.description: Build kickoff: the heavens lifted from the primordial sea.

creator-gods.name: Council at the World Tree
creator-gods.description: Mid-project gate: cosmic review at the ceiba's roots.

creator-gods.name: Maize Harvest Tribute
creator-gods.description: Phase invoice trigger: the first ears of corn offered.

creator-gods.name: Dawn of the Fifth Sun
creator-gods.description: Go-Live: the new age begins, the world holds.

creator-gods.name: Hand-off to the Day-Keepers
creator-gods.description: Hyper-care close: the calendar entrusted to the priests.

popol-vuh-hero-twins.name: Summons from Xibalba
popol-vuh-hero-twins.description: Project kickoff: the owl messengers arrive at the ballcourt.

popol-vuh-hero-twins.name: Descent of the Twisted Path
popol-vuh-hero-twins.description: Build phase: the road into the underworld is mapped.

popol-vuh-hero-twins.name: House of Bats Survived
popol-vuh-hero-twins.description: UAT gate: the trial of darkness passed.

popol-vuh-hero-twins.name: Defeat of the Death Lords
popol-vuh-hero-twins.description: Go-Live: the twins triumph in the great ballcourt.

popol-vuh-hero-twins.name: Ascent into the Sky
popol-vuh-hero-twins.description: Hyper-care close: the twins become sun and moon.

popol-vuh-hero-twins.name: Father's Burial Tribute
popol-vuh-hero-twins.description: Final invoice: offerings laid at Hun Hunahpu's grave.

xibalba-underworld-lords.name: Opening of the Cenote Gate
xibalba-underworld-lords.description: Discovery: the underworld surveillance plane online.

xibalba-underworld-lords.name: Forge the Houses of Trial
xibalba-underworld-lords.description: Build: the six houses of torment commissioned.

xibalba-underworld-lords.name: One Death's Audit
xibalba-underworld-lords.description: Solution review with the Lords of the underworld.

xibalba-underworld-lords.name: Bone Court Activation
xibalba-underworld-lords.description: Go-Live: Xibalba fully operational, every soul accounted.

xibalba-underworld-lords.name: Cenote Closes
xibalba-underworld-lords.description: Project close: the gate sealed until next conjuring.

xibalba-underworld-lords.name: Death Tribute Reckoning
xibalba-underworld-lords.description: Final invoice from the Lords of Death.

mayan-rulers-and-warriors.name: Coronation at Palenque
mayan-rulers-and-warriors.description: Kickoff ceremony in the throne room of the Temple of Inscriptions.

mayan-rulers-and-warriors.name: Carving of the Stelae
mayan-rulers-and-warriors.description: Discovery: the lineage glyphs cut into limestone.

mayan-rulers-and-warriors.name: Weave the Tribute Dashboards
mayan-rulers-and-warriors.description: Build: dashboards woven from jade and quetzal feathers.

mayan-rulers-and-warriors.name: Tribute-Bearers' Procession
mayan-rulers-and-warriors.description: UAT acceptance: vassal cities present their offerings.

mayan-rulers-and-warriors.name: Dedication of the Temple
mayan-rulers-and-warriors.description: Go-Live + handoff: the new pyramid consecrated.

mayan-rulers-and-warriors.name: Royal Treasury Settlement
mayan-rulers-and-warriors.description: Final invoice paid in jade, cacao, and obsidian.

Hunab Ku.notes: Withdrawal beyond the thirteen heavens — quarterly contemplation.

Itzamna.notes: Tour of the celestial libraries — knowledge audit.

Ix Chel.notes: Pilgrimage to Cozumel — moon ceremony for midwives.

Kukulkan.notes: Equinox descent at Chichén Itzá — twice-yearly serpent appearance.

Chaac.notes: Rain-bringing tour of the four quarters.

Hunahpu.notes: Recovery from the House of Bats — head reattachment leave.

Xbalanque.notes: Visit to Grandmother Ixmucane — overdue meal.

Ixmucane.notes: Maize-grinding ceremony — sacred to the grandmother.

One Death.notes: Annual Death Lords' retreat — strategic planning at the Bone Court.

Seven Death.notes: Inspection tour of the six Houses of Trial.

Pakal the Great.notes: Sarcophagus inspection — Temple of Inscriptions audit.

Lady Six Sky.notes: State visit to Naranjo — diplomatic mission.

Yax K'uk Mo'.notes: Founder's pilgrimage to Copán — annual remembrance.
